parsed.production_notes: The video consists entirely of AI-generated still images. This is evident from surreal concepts, unnatural blending of objects, and typical AI artifacts in textures and lighting.

scenes.setting: Desert landscape at sunset with a ruined wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: A man sits in a barber chair in a desert at sunset. Another man stands behind him, cutting his hair. A ruined wall and mirror are in the background.

scenes.visual_description: A montage of surreal Mexican-themed AI images. Shows a mariachi with a flaming hat, a desert haircut, masked dancers, and a swimmer in cacti.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: Una Beretta pa' seguridad. [A Beretta for security.]
Unknown speaker says: Al que se meta le va a tronar, se va pa' allá. [Whoever interferes will get blasted, they'll go over there.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
"you'll never be bilingual"
me 2.5 months after switching from duolingo to speak

scenes.setting: Dark wrestling arena with a spotlight.

panels.panel_visual_description: A man in a silver lucha libre mask sits cross-legged in a dark wrestling ring. He eats tacos from a plate on the mat under a spotlight.

scenes.visual_description: Montage continues. Shows a horse in a kitchen, a girl with a bull, a wrestler eating tacos, and an old man smoking by a TV.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Traigo metales como mi apá. [I carry weapons like my dad.]

scenes.setting: Desert landscape with a vintage pickup truck.

panels.panel_visual_description: A giant green iguana rests on the roof of a rusty blue vintage pickup truck. The truck is parked in a desert landscape under a clear sky.

scenes.visual_description: Montage continues. Shows dogs in sombreros, a mechanic working indoors, an iguana on a truck, and a bride waiting on a desert road.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: En los cerros de la sierra me enseñaron a apuntar. [In the hills of the sierra they taught me to aim.]

scenes.setting: Outdoor patio with a pink wall and papel picado.

panels.panel_visual_description: An elderly man in a straw hat and plaid shirt holds a metal mug. A pink axolotl rests on his hat. The background is a pink wall with papel picado.

scenes.visual_description: Final montage images. Shows an old man with an axolotl on his hat, followed by ornate black mariachi suits hanging on a clothesline in the desert.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Ando en la quema, me doy a respetar. [I'm in the fire, I make myself respected.]
